name: scheduler
description: Local job scheduler. Manages recurring shell jobs with cron expressions and random daily windows.

status.description: Daemon running state, job count, enabled count, next scheduled run time

items.description: List all jobs: id, name, schedule, enabled, last_run, next_run, last_exit_code

action_run.description: Execute a job immediately and return exit code, stdout, stderr

capabilities.description: Runs recurring shell commands on cron schedules and manages the nanika publishing pipeline. Use when scheduling jobs, running the daemon, checking job history, enabling or disabling jobs, or setting up automated workflows.
triggers: check what scheduled jobs are running

daemon.description: Start the daemon that polls and executes scheduled jobs

init.description: Create the default nanika publishing pipeline jobs (scout, engage, weekly-brief)

jobs disable.description: Disable a job without removing it

jobs remove.description: Remove a job and its run history

run.description: Run a job immediately, ignoring its schedule

logs.description: View execution output for a job

history.description: Show recent job run events (newest first)

status.description: Show daemon state, job counts, and next scheduled run

doctor.description: Verify installation: CLIs, database, and daemon status
